summary.intent: Fix PR review comments on moltis PR #439 and ensure all changes are committed and pushed.
summary.outcome: Fixed two issues (renderServerName prop destructuring and display_name null handling), resolved all PR threads, and committed a missed iOS GraphQL schema update for the new displayName field.

repo: renderServerName expects a destructured { server } object, not the server value directly
display_name on add should send null when blank to stay consistent with the edit path
The iOS GraphQL schema at apps/ios/GraphQL/Schema/schema.graphqls must be manually updated when new fields are added to the API

code.finding: iOS GraphQL schema requires a separate commit update when new fields like displayName are added; it is not auto-generated alongside the main schema change

workflow: Git status check revealed a modified file that was missed before declaring the working tree clean — always verify before confirming nothing to commit
PR thread resolution should be verified via API/CLI after fixes, not assumed

friction: Prematurely declared the working tree clean without running git status, missing the schema.graphqls change
Re-fetched PR comments that had already been addressed, causing redundant work
